title: Initial teacher education (ITE) inspection: toolkit, operating guide and framework
body: "Find guidance for initial teacher education inspections in England:    ITE inspection toolkit – what inspectors and ITE providers use to discuss the quality of provision on inspection  ITE inspection framework – the principles of ITE inspection  ITE inspection operating guide – a step-by-step guide for inspectors on how to inspect ITE provision  information about ITE inspections – for staff and leaders, parents and carers and the wider public    This guidance will replace the initial teacher education (ITE) inspection framework and handbook from January 2026.   "
